Temporal Orientation - Able to Report Correct Month - The data in this column identifies how closely the patient knew the current month. CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies how closely the patient knew the current month. 0 = Missed by 1 month or no answer
1 = Missed by 6 days to 1 month
2 = Accurate within 5 days
